channel.title: CREEK on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in CREEK on Tech Tracker

item.title: CREEK - A platform for founders, investors & startup community to help together.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-pHq9ObiGt88/YVqm5SnsxhI/AAAAAAAAG2M/L6AXLjXmXe4tvc8v32ueydciIMIgdVkagCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1633330911164093-0.png" alt=""> If you just started your own startup company then in this competitive world you may require guidance or help from fellow established founders, investors and new entrepreneurs which will help you grow your new startup by sharing ideas with them and get financial help from Investors to expand scale and improve your startup company but it is not must but surely help you to build a successful company.
